records.chapter: Reward of the Ziyarat of the graves of Imams (a.s.)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 3. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to us by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Ghiyath from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Abi Nasr al-Bazanti who said: It is narrated that a letter of Imam Ridha (a.s.) contained the following text: “Convey to my Shias that the reward of my Ziyarat equals to one thousand Hajjs.” The narrator asked Imam Jawad (a.s.), “Is it equal to a thousand Hajjs?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “Yes, one who performs his Ziyarat knowing his right this act is equal to a million Hajjs.” Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says that one who performs the Ziyarat of any one of us will get the reward of the Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.).”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ غِیَاثٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی نَصْرٍ الْبَزَنْطِیِّ قَالَ: قَرَأْتُ کِتَابَ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ع أَبْلِغْ شِیعَتِی أَنَّ زِیَارَتِی تَعْدِلُ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ أَلْفَ حِجَّهٍ قَالَ فَقُلْتُ لِأَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع أَلْفَ حِجَّهٍ قَالَ إِی وَ اللَّهِ وَ أَلْفَا حِجَّهٍ لِمَنْ زَارَهُ عَارِفاً بِحَقِّهِ قَالَ الصَّادِقُ ع مَنْ زَارَ وَاحِداً مِنَّا کَانَ کَمَنْ زَارَ الْحُسَیْنَ ع.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 3. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to us by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Ghiyath from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Abi Nasr al-Bazanti who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: It is narrated that a letter of Imam Ridha (a.s.) contained the following text: “Convey to my Shias that the reward of my Ziyarat equals to one thousand Hajjs.” The narrator asked Imam Jawad (a.s.), “Is it equal to a thousand Hajjs?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “Yes, one who performs his Ziyarat knowing his right this act is equal to a million Hajjs.” Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says that one who performs the Ziyarat of any one of us will get the reward of the Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.).”

records.chapter: Reward of Ziyarat of Masuma Qum
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rh) said: it was narrated to us by Ali b. Ibrahim from his father from Sa’d b. Sa’eed from Abi al-Hassan al-Rida (a.s.) who said: I (the narrator) asked him regarding the grave of Fatima binte Musa bin Ja'far (a.s.). He (the Imam) replied, “Whoever visits her will get Paradise.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَلِیُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِیمَ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ع قَالَ: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ قَبْرِ فَاطِمَهَ بِنْتِ مُوسَی بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ ع فَقَالَ مَنْ زَارَهَا فَلَهُ الْجَنَّهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rh) said: it was narrated to us by Ali b. Ibrahim from his father from Sa’d b. Sa’eed from Abi al-Hassan al-Rida (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: I (the narrator) asked him regarding the grave of Fatima binte Musa bin Ja'far (a.s.). He (the Imam) replied, “Whoever visits her will get Paradise.”

records.chapter: Reward of Ziyarat of Abdul Azim Hasani (r.a.) in Rayy
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  The narrator says that a person from the people of Rayy went to Imam Ali Naqi (a.s.). Imam (a.s.) asked him, “Where are  you  coming  from?”  He  replied,  “I  am  coming  after performing  the  Ziyarat  of  Imam  Husain  (a.s.).”  The  Imam said: However if you perform the Ziyarat of Abdul Azim in the city of Rayy it is as if you have performed the Ziyarat of Imam Husain bin Ali (a.s.).”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِیُّ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَمْزَهُ بْنُ الْقَاسِمِ الْعَلَوِیُّ ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی الْعَطَّارُ عَمَّنْ دَخَلَ عَلَی أَبِی الْحَسَنِ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْهَادِی مِنْ أَهْلِ الرَّیِّ قَالَ: دَخَلْتُ عَلَی أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الْعَسْکَرِیِّ ع فَقَالَ أَیْنَ کُنْتَ قُلْتُ زُرْتُ الْحُسَیْنَ ع قَالَ أَمَا إِنَّکَ لَوْ زُرْتَ قَبْرَ عَبْدِ الْعَظِیمِ عِنْدَکُمْ لَکُنْتَ کَمَنْ زَارَ الْحُسَیْنَ بْنَ عَلِیٍّ ع.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1.  The narrator says that a person from the people of Rayy went to Imam Ali Naqi (a.s.). Imam (a.s.) asked him, “Where are  you  coming  from?”  He  replied,  “I  am  coming  after performing  the  Ziyarat  of  Imam  Husain  (a.s.).”  The  Imam said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: However if you perform the Ziyarat of Abdul Azim in the city of Rayy it is as if you have performed the Ziyarat of Imam Husain bin Ali (a.s.).”

records.chapter: Reward of one who cannot do good to Ahle Bayt (a.s.) and he does so to a righteous devotee of theirs and Reward of one who cannot do Ziyarat of Ahle Bayt (a.s.) but does the Ziyarat of a righteous devotee of Ahle Bayt (a.s.)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to us by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Isa from a chain he narrated from al-Sadiq (a.s.) who said: “One who cannot do good to us, should do good to our lovers and friends. He will get the reward of doing good to us. One who cannot perform our Ziyarat, should perform the Ziyarat of our virtuous lovers and friends. He will get the reward of performing our Ziyarat.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی بِإِسْنَادٍ ذَکَرَهُ عَنِ الصَّادِقِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ لَمْ یَقْدِرْ عَلَی صَلَاتِنَا فَلْیُصَلِّ صَالِحِی مَوَالِینَا وَ مَنْ لَمْ یَقْدِرْ عَلَی زِیَارَتِنَا فَلْیَزُرْ صَالِحِی مَوَالِینَا یَکْتُبِ اللَّهُ لَهُ ثَوَابَ زِیَارَتِنَا.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to us by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Isa from a chain he narrated from al-Sadiq (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who cannot do good to us, should do good to our lovers and friends. He will get the reward of doing good to us. One who cannot perform our Ziyarat, should perform the Ziyarat of our virtuous lovers and friends. He will get the reward of performing our Ziyarat.”

records.chapter: Reward of doing good to an Imam
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Ahmad b. Idris from ’Imran b. Musa from Ya’qub b. Yazid from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Abi Nasr from Hamad b. Uthman from Ishaq b. Ammar who said: The narrator asked Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.), “What is the meaning of this verse: ‘Who is it that will offer of Allah a goodly gift, so He will multiply it to him manifold’?”10 Imam (a.s.) replied, “It implies doing good to an Imam.” The narrator says that his father too heard such a tradition from Imam (a.s.).
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِدْرِیسَ عَنْ عِمْرَانَ بْنِ مُوسَی عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی نَصْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِلصَّادِقِ ع مَا مَعْنَی قَوْلِهِ تَبَارَکَ وَ تَعَالَی- مَنْ ذَا الَّذِی یُقْرِضُ اللَّهَ قَرْضاً حَسَناً فَیُضاعِفَهُ لَهُ أَضْعافاً کَثِیرَهً قَالَ صِلَهُ الْإِمَامِ- أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ عَلِیِّ بْنِ الْفَضْلِ عَنْ أَبِی طَالِبٍ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الصَّلْتِ عَنْ یُونُسَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع بِمِثْلِهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Ahmad b. Idris from ’Imran b. Musa from Ya’qub b. Yazid from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Abi Nasr from Hamad b. Uthman from Ishaq b. Ammar who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: The narrator asked Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.), “What is the meaning of this verse: ‘Who is it that will offer of Allah a goodly gift, so He will multiply it to him manifold’?”10 Imam (a.s.) replied, “It implies doing good to an Imam.” The narrator says that his father too heard such a tradition from Imam (a.s.).

records.chapter: Reward of the people of Quran
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) narrates from his father that the Holy  Prophet  (s.a.w.s.)  said,  “The  ranks  of  the  people  of Quran come next to that of the prophets and messengers. Don’t ever consider the people of Quran as weak and don’t reduce their rights for they have a high status near Allah.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِدْرِیسَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی أَبُو إِسْحَاقَ إِبْرَاهِیمُ بْنُ هَاشِمٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الْفَارِسِیِ عَنْ سُلَیْمَانَ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ الْجَعْفَرِیِّ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ أَبِی زِیَادٍ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ النَّبِیُّ ص إِنَّ أَهْلَ الْقُرْآنِ فِی أَعْلَی دَرَجَهٍ مِنَ الْآدَمِیِّینَ مَا خَلَا النَّبِیِّینَ وَ الْمُرْسَلِینَ وَ لَا تَسْتَضْعِفُوا أَهْلَ الْقُرْآنِ وَ حُقُوقَهُمْ فَإِنَّ لَهُمْ مِنَ اللَّهِ لَمَکَاناً.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting a complete Quran in Mecca
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Muhammad b. al-Hussain from Ibn Abi al-Khattab from al-Nadhr b. Shu’aib from al-Hussain b. Mad al-Qalanisi from Abi Hamzah from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “One who recites a complete Quran between time span of two Fridays or more or less than that then concludes this recitation on Friday Allah would note down the reward of all the good deeds performed from a Friday before his birth till the last Friday. And if he concludes it on any other day then too he will get the same reward.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِی الْخَطَّابِ عَنِ النَّضْرِ بْنِ شُعَیْبٍ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ مَادٍّ الْقَلَانِسِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی حَمْزَهَ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ خَتَمَ الْقُرْآنَ بِمَکَّهَ مِنْ جُمُعَهٍ إِلَی جُمُعَهٍ وَ أَقَلَّ مِنْ ذَلِکَ وَ أَکْثَرَ وَ خَتَمَهُ یَوْمَ الْجُمُعَهِ کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ مِنَ الْأَجْرِ وَ الْحَسَنَاتِ مِنْ أَوَّلِ جُمُعَهٍ کَانَتْ فِی الدُّنْیَا إِلَی آخِرِ جُمُعَهٍ تَکُونُ فِیهَا وَ إِنْ خَتَمَهُ فِی سَائِرِ الْأَیَّامِ فَکَذَلِکَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Muhammad b. al-Hussain from Ibn Abi al-Khattab from al-Nadhr b. Shu’aib from al-Hussain b. Mad al-Qalanisi from Abi Hamzah from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites a complete Quran between time span of two Fridays or more or less than that then concludes this recitation on Friday Allah would note down the reward of all the good deeds performed from a Friday before his birth till the last Friday. And if he concludes it on any other day then too he will get the same reward.”

records.chapter: Reward of memorizing the Quran with difficulty or with ease
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says, “One who memorizes Quran with difficulty will get two rewards and one who memorizes it with ease would be included among the virtuous.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ عَوْنٍ عَنِ الصَّبَّاحِ بْنِ سَیَابَهَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع یَقُولُ مَنْ شُدِّدَ عَلَیْهِ الْقُرْآنُ کَانَ لَهُ أَجْرٌ وَ مَنْ یُسِّرَ عَلَیْهِ کَانَ مَعَ الْأَبْرَارِ.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting the Holy Quran for youth
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa b. al-Mutawakil who said it was narrated to me by Abdillah b. Ja’far al-Himyari from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Isa from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Malik b. ’Atiyyah from Minhal al-Qassab from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “If a youth among believers recites the Holy Quran it gets mixed in his flesh and blood. The Almighty Allah would keep him with virtuous and honored angels and the Holy Quran would act as a shield against the fire of Hell for him on the Day of Judgment. The Holy Quran would say, ‘People who acted upon anything except me have got their result. O Allah! You give the best rewards to these people’. Allah would make the reciter of the Holy Quran wear two dresses of Paradise and keep the crown of honor on his head. Allah would tell the Holy Quran, ‘Are you satisfied now?’ It would reply, ‘I desire a better reward’. Now Allah would grant peace from right and an eternal Paradise from left and then make him enter Paradise. He would be told in Paradise, ‘Go on reciting a verse of the Holy Quran and your position will go on increasing by one level for each of them’. Then the Holy Quran would be addressed, ‘Are you pleased now?’ The Holy Quran would say, ‘Yes my Lord!’” Imam (a.s.) says that one who recites the Holy Quran much and is regular in it, the Almighty Allah would grant him this reward twice.
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْحِمْیَرِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ مَالِکِ بْنِ عَطِیَّهَ عَنْ مِنْهَالٍ الْقَصَّابِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ الْقُرْآنَ وَ هُوَ شَابٌّ مُؤْمِنٌ اخْتَلَطَ الْقُرْآنُ بِدَمِهِ وَ لَحْمِهِ وَ جَعَلَهُ اللَّهُ مَعَ السَّفَرَهِ الْکِرَامِ الْبَرَرَهِ وَ کَانَ الْقُرْآنُ حَجِیجاً عَنْهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ یَقُولُ یَا رَبِّ إِنَّ کُلَّ عَامِلٍ قَدْ أَصَابَ أَجْرَ عَمَلِهِ إِلَّا عَامِلِی فَبَلِّغْ بِهِ کَرِیمَ عَطَایَاکَ فَیَکْسُوهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ حُلَّتَیْنِ مِنْ حُلَلِ الْجَنَّهِ وَ یُوضَعُ عَلَی رَأْسِهِ تَاجُ الْکَرَامَهِ ثُمَّ یُقَالُ لَهُ هَلْ أَرْضَیْنَاکَ فِیهِ فَیَقُولُ الْقُرْآنُ یَا رَبِّ قَدْ کُنْتُ أَرْغَبُ لَهُ فِیمَا هُوَ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ هَذَا قَالَ فَیُعْطَی الْأَمْنَ بِیَمِینِهِ وَ الْخُلْدَ بِیَسَارِهِ ثُمَّ یَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّهَ فَیُقَالُ لَهُ اقْرَأْ آیَهً وَ اصْعَدْ دَرَجَهً ثُمَّ یُقَالُ لَهُ بَلَّغْنَا بِهِ وَ أَرْضَیْنَاکَ فِیهِ فَیَقُولُ اللَّهُمَّ نَعَمْ قَالَ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ کَثِیراً وَ تَعَاهَدَهُ مِنْ شِدَّهِ حِفْظِهِ أَعْطَاهُ اللَّهُ أَجْرَ هَذَا مَرَّتَیْنِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa b. al-Mutawakil who said it was narrated to me by Abdillah b. Ja’far al-Himyari from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Isa from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Malik b. ’Atiyyah from Minhal al-Qassab from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “If a youth among believers recites the Holy Quran it gets mixed in his flesh and blood. The Almighty Allah would keep him with virtuous and honored angels and the Holy Quran would act as a shield against the fire of Hell for him on the Day of Judgment. The Holy Quran would say, ‘People who acted upon anything except me have got their result. O Allah! You give the best rewards to these people’. Allah would make the reciter of the Holy Quran wear two dresses of Paradise and keep the crown of honor on his head. Allah would tell the Holy Quran, ‘Are you satisfied now?’ It would reply, ‘I desire a better reward’. Now Allah would grant peace from right and an eternal Paradise from left and then make him enter Paradise. He would be told in Paradise, ‘Go on reciting a verse of the Holy Quran and your position will go on increasing by one level for each of them’. Then the Holy Quran would be addressed, ‘Are you pleased now?’ The Holy Quran would say, ‘Yes my Lord!’” Imam (a.s.) says that one who recites the Holy Quran much and is regular in it, the Almighty Allah would grant him this reward twice.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting the Holy Quran in Salaat, apart from it, sitting and standing
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Ja’far b. Muhammad b. Masruq who said it was narrated to me by al-Hassan b. Muhammad b. ’Amir from his uncle Abdillah b. ’Amir from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Abdillah b. Sulayman from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “One who recites the Holy Quran while standing in Salaat, Allah would grant him one hundred rewards for each alphabet and if a person recites the Holy Quran while sitting in Salaat, Allah would grant him fifty rewards for each alphabet. One who recites the Holy Quran apart from Salaat, Allah would grant him ten rewards for each letter.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مَسْرُوقٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی الْحَسَنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنْ عَمِّهِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سُلَیْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ الْقُرْآنَ قَائِماً فِی صَلَاتِهِ کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِکُلِّ حَرْفٍ مِائَهَ حَسَنَهٍ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَهُ فِی صَلَاتِهِ جَالِساً کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِکُلِّ حَرْفٍ خَمْسِینَ حَسَنَهً وَ مَنْ قَرَأَهُ فِی غَیْرِ صَلَاتِهِ کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِکُلِّ حَرْفٍ عَشْرَ حَسَنَاتٍ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Ja’far b. Muhammad b. Masruq who said it was narrated to me by al-Hassan b. Muhammad b. ’Amir from his uncle Abdillah b. ’Amir from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Abdillah b. Sulayman from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites the Holy Quran while standing in Salaat, Allah would grant him one hundred rewards for each alphabet and if a person recites the Holy Quran while sitting in Salaat, Allah would grant him fifty rewards for each alphabet. One who recites the Holy Quran apart from Salaat, Allah would grant him ten rewards for each letter.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting one hundred to five hundred verses of the Holy Quran in Salaat
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ali b. Majluwayh from his uncle Muhammad b. Abi al-Qasim from Muhammad b. Isa from al-Hussain b. Ali from Ishaq b. Ammar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites a hundred verses in Salaat-e-Shab, Allah would note down the reward of offering Salaat for the whole night for him and one who recites two hundred verses at night apart from Salaat-e-Shab, the Almighty Allah would write a Qintar of good deeds on Lauh-e-Mahfuz. A single Qintar is equal to twelve hundred Awqiya and a single Awqiya is bigger that Mount Ohad.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مَاجِیلَوَیْهِ عَنْ عَمِّهِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ مِائَهَ آیَهٍ یُصَلِّی بِهَا فِی لَیْلَهٍ کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِهَا قُنُوتَ لَیْلَهٍ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ مِائَتَیْ آیَهٍ فِی لَیْلَهٍ مِنْ غَیْرِ صَلَاهِ اللَّیْلِ کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ فِی اللَّوْحِ قِنْطَاراً مِنَ الْحَسَنَاتِ وَ الْقِنْطَارُ أَلْفٌ وَ مِائَتَا أُوقِیَّهٍ وَ الْأُوقِیَّهُ أَعْظَمُ مِنْ جَبَلِ أُحُدٍ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ali b. Majluwayh from his uncle Muhammad b. Abi al-Qasim from Muhammad b. Isa from al-Hussain b. Ali from Ishaq b. Ammar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites a hundred verses in Salaat-e-Shab, Allah would note down the reward of offering Salaat for the whole night for him and one who recites two hundred verses at night apart from Salaat-e-Shab, the Almighty Allah would write a Qintar of good deeds on Lauh-e-Mahfuz. A single Qintar is equal to twelve hundred Awqiya and a single Awqiya is bigger that Mount Ohad.”

records.chapter: Reward of one who memorizes the Holy Quran and one who obeys its commandments
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by al-Hussain b. Ahmad from his father from Ahmad b. Muhammad from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Jameel b. Salih from al-Fadhl b. Yasar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “A person who memorizes the Holy Quran and obeys its commandments is in the group of senior angels.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی الْحُسَیْنُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ جَمِیلِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنِ الْفَضْلِ بْنِ یَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: الْحَافِظُ لِلْقُرْآنِ وَ الْعَامِلُ بِهِ مَعَ السَّفَرَهِ الْکِرَامِ الْبَرَرَهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by al-Hussain b. Ahmad from his father from Ahmad b. Muhammad from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Jameel b. Salih from al-Fadhl b. Yasar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “A person who memorizes the Holy Quran and obeys its commandments is in the group of senior angels.”

records.chapter: Difficulty in memorizing the Holy Quran and reciting a Surah before going to bed
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “One who tries to memorize the  Holy  Quran  with  extreme  difficulty  due  to  a  weak memory will get two rewards.” He further said, “Why don’t the  people  who  trade  in  markets  whole  day  not  recite  a Surah when they return to their homes at night before going to bed? If they do so they would get ten rewards for each verse and ten sins will be wiped off.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی عَلِیُّ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ الْمُکَتِّبُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ جَعْفَرٍ الْحِمْیَرِیِّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ جَمِیلِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنِ الْفُضَیْلِ بْنِ یَسَارٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع یَقُولُ إِنَّ الَّذِی یُعَالِجُ الْقُرْآنَ لِیَحْفَظَهُ بِمَشَقَّهٍ مِنْهُ وَ قِلَّهِ حِفْظٍ لَهُ أَجْرَانِ وَ قَالَ مَا یَمْنَعُ التَّاجِرَ مِنْکُمُ الْمَشْغُولَ فِی سُوقِهِ إِذَا رَجَعَ إِلَی مَنْزِلِهِ أَنْ لَا یَنَامَ حَتَّی یَقْرَأَ سُورَهً مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ فَیُکْتَبَ لَهُ مَکَانَ کُلِّ آیَهٍ یَقْرَؤُهَا عَشْرُ حَسَنَاتٍ وَ یُمْحَی عَنْهُ عَشْرُ سَیِّئَاتٍ.

records.chapter: Reward of a one who comes and goes
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah al-Barqi who said it was narrated to me by al-Hussain b. Yazid al-Nawfali from al-Sakuni from Abi Abdillah who said: Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) was asked, “Who is the best of men?” The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) replied, “One who comes and goes.” He was again asked, “What is meant by one who comes and goes?” He replied, “One who starts and ends. One who starts reciting the Holy Quran and ends it. There is no one nearer to Allah than him and his supplications are accepted.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِیِّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی الْحُسَیْنُ بْنُ یَزِیدَ النَّوْفَلِیُّ عَنِ السَّکُونِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ: قِیلَ یَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ أَیُّ الرِّجَالِ خَیْرٌ قَالَ الْحَالُّ الْمُرْتَحِلُ قِیلَ یَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ وَ مَا الْحَالُّ الْمُرْتَحِلُ قَالَ الْفَاتِحُ الْخَاتِمُ الَّذِی یَفْتَحُ الْقُرْآنَ وَ یَخْتِمُهُ فَلَهُ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ دَعْوَهٌ مُسْتَجَابَهٌ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah al-Barqi who said it was narrated to me by al-Hussain b. Yazid al-Nawfali from al-Sakuni from Abi Abdillah who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) was asked, “Who is the best of men?” The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) replied, “One who comes and goes.” He was again asked, “What is meant by one who comes and goes?” He replied, “One who starts and ends. One who starts reciting the Holy Quran and ends it. There is no one nearer to Allah than him and his supplications are accepted.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciter of the Holy Quran
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  says,  “The  reciter  of  the  Holy Quran is rich; there is no misery for him and one who does not recite the Holy Quran is not rich.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَلِیُّ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ السَّعْدَآبَادِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی بْنِ عُبَیْدٍ عَنْ سُلَیْمَانَ بْنِ رَاشِدٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ مُعَاوِیَهَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع مَنْ قَرَأَ الْقُرْآنَ فَهُوَ غَنِیٌّ وَ لَا فَقْرَ بَعْدَهُ وَ الأمانه [إِلَّا مَا بِهِ] غِنًی.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting the Holy Quran by looking at it
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ahmad b. Abdillah from Ya’qub b. Yazid from a man from the general populace who raised it to Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites the Holy Quran by looking at it, his eyes will become stronger and the chastisement of his parents would be reduced even if they had been disbelievers.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنْ رَجُلٍ مِنَ الْعَوَامِّ رَفَعَهُ إِلَی أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ فِی الْمُصْحَفِ نَظَراً مُتِّعَ بِبَصَرِهِ وَ خُفِّفَ عَنْ وَالِدَیْهِ وَ إِنْ کَانَا کَافِرَیْنِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ahmad b. Abdillah from Ya’qub b. Yazid from a man from the general populace who raised it to Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites the Holy Quran by looking at it, his eyes will become stronger and the chastisement of his parents would be reduced even if they had been disbelievers.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting the Holy Quran by looking at it
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 2. And from the previous chain who raised it to The Prophet (s.a.w.s.) who said: “There is nothing more severe for Satan except a person reciting the Holy Quran by looking at it.”
records.arabicText: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ رَفَعَهُ إِلَی النَّبِیِّ ص قَالَ: لَیْسَ شَیْ ءٌ أَشَدَّ عَلَی الشَّیْطَانِ مِنْ قِرَاءَهِ الْمُصْحَفِ نَظَراً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 2. And from the previous chain who raised it to The Prophet (s.a.w.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “There is nothing more severe for Satan except a person reciting the Holy Quran by looking at it.”

records.chapter: Reward of keeping the Holy Quran at one’s home
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Ali b. al-Hussain al-Sa’dabadi from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah al-Barqi from Ali b. al-Hussain al-Sayrafi from Hamad b. Isa from Ja’far from his father (a.s.) who said: “I like keeping the Holy Quran at home. Allah keeps Satan away from the house because of it.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَلِیُّ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ السَّعْدَآبَادِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِیِّ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ الصَّیْرَفِیِّ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنْ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ ع قَالَ: إِنِّی لَیُعْجِبُنِی أَنْ یَکُونَ فِی الْبَیْتِ مُصْحَفٌ لا یَطْرُدُ اللَّهُ بِهِ الشَّیْطَانَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Ali b. al-Hussain al-Sa’dabadi from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah al-Barqi from Ali b. al-Hussain al-Sayrafi from Hamad b. Isa from Ja’far from his father (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “I like keeping the Holy Quran at home. Allah keeps Satan away from the house because of it.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting ten to one thousand verses during a night
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.) says that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.)  said,  “One  who  recites  ten  verses  of  the  Holy Quran at night won’t be included among the ignorant ones. One who recites fifty verses would be included among those who  remember  Allah  much.  One  who  recites  a  hundred verses  would  be  included  among  those  who  perform Qunoot.  One  who  recites  two  hundred  verses  would  be included among Khashi-in (most humble). One who recites three hundred verses would be included among successful people.  One  who  recites  five  hundred  verses  would  be included  among  Mujtahideen  (Holy  warriors).  One  who recites  a  thousand  verses  would  get  the  reward  of  one Qintar and a single Qintar is worth fifteen thousand Mithqal gold  and  a  single  Mithqal  comprises  of  twenty-four  Qirat and  the  smallest  Qirat  is  equal  to  Mount  Ohad  and  the biggest Qirat is equal to the distance between the earth and the heaven.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنِ النَّضْرِ بْنِ سُوَیْدٍ عَنْ یَحْیَی الْحَلَبِیِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مَرْوَانَ عَنْ سَعِیدِ بْنِ ظَرِیفٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ قَرَأَ عَشْرَ آیَاتٍ فِی لَیْلَهٍ لَمْ یُکْتَبْ مِنَ الْغَافِلِینَ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ خَمْسِینَ آیَهً کُتِبَ مِنَ الذَّاکِرِینَ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ مِائَهَ آیَهٍ کُتِبَ مِنَ الْقَانِتِینَ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ مِائَتَیْ آیَهٍ کُتِبَ مِنَ الْخَاشِعِینَ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ ثَلَاثَمِائَهِ آیَهٍ کُتِبَ مِنَ الْفَائِزِینَ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ خَمْسَمِائَهِ آیَهٍ کُتِبَ مِنَ الْمُجْتَهِدِینَ وَ [مَنْ] قَرَأَ أَلْفَ آیَهٍ کُتِبَ لَهُ قِنْطَاراً وَ الْقِنْطَارُ خَمْسُمِائَهِ أَلْفِ مِثْقَالِ ذَهَبٍ وَ الْمِثْقَالُ أَرْبَعَهٌ وَ عِشْرُونَ قِیرَاطاً أَصْغَرُهَا مِثْلُ جَبَلِ أُحُدٍ وَ أَکْبَرُهَا مَا بَیْنَ السَّمَاءِ وَ الْأَرْضِ.

records.chapter: Reward of the best season of the Holy Quran
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Ali b. al-Hussain al-Sa’dabadi from Ahmad b. al-Nadhr from ’Amru b. Shimr from Jabir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) that he said: “There is a best season for everything and the best season of reciting the Holy Quran is the month of Ramadan.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَلِیُّ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ السَّعْدَآبَادِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ النَّضْرِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ شِمْرٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع أَنَّهُ قَالَ: لِکُلِّ شَیْ ءٍ رَبِیعٌ وَ رَبِیعُ الْقُرْآنِ شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Ali b. al-Hussain al-Sa’dabadi from Ahmad b. al-Nadhr from ’Amru b. Shimr from Jabir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) that he said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “There is a best season for everything and the best season of reciting the Holy Quran is the month of Ramadan.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting a hundred verses of the Holy Quran and saying Yaa Allaah seven times
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ali b. Majluwayh from his uncle Muhammad b. Abi al-Qasim from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from Ali b. Asbat who raised it to Ameer al-Mumineen (a.s.) who said: “One who says Yaa Allaah seven times after reciting a hundred verses of the Holy Quran from anywhere, even if he prays against Sakhr (a stone) it would be dislodged from its place.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مَاجِیلَوَیْهِ عَنْ عَمِّهِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ أَسْبَاطٍ یَرْفَعُهُ إِلَی أَمِیرِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ مِائَهَ آیَهٍ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ مِنْ أَیِّ الْقُرْآنِ شَاءَ ثُمَّ قَالَ یَا اللَّهُ سَبْعَ مَرَّاتٍ فَلَوْ دَعَا عَلَی الصَّخْرَهِ لَقَلَعَهَا إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ali b. Majluwayh from his uncle Muhammad b. Abi al-Qasim from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from Ali b. Asbat who raised it to Ameer al-Mumineen (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who says Yaa Allaah seven times after reciting a hundred verses of the Holy Quran from anywhere, even if he prays against Sakhr (a stone) it would be dislodged from its place.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Hamd
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says, “The Greatest Name of Allah is in Ummul Kitab (source of the book) i.e. Surah Hamd.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی الْعَطَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَسَّانَ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِیِّ بْنِ أَبِی حَمْزَهَ الْبَطَائِنِیُّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع اسْمُ اللَّهِ الْأَعْظَمُ مُقَطَّعٌ فِی أُمِّ الْکِتَابِ.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Baqarah and Surah Aale Imran
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Idris from Muhammad b. Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ismail b. Mihran from al-Hassan b. Ali from his father from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Baqarah and Surah Aale Imran, these Surahs will cover him like a cloud on the Day of Judgment.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِدْرِیسَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَسَّانَ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ الْبَقَرَهَ وَ آلَ عِمْرَانَ جَاءَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ تُظِلَّانِهِ عَلَی رَأْسِهِ مِثْلَ الْغَمَامَتَیْنِ أَوْ مِثْلَ الْغَیَابَتَیْنِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Idris from Muhammad b. Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ismail b. Mihran from al-Hassan b. Ali from his father from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Baqarah and Surah Aale Imran, these Surahs will cover him like a cloud on the Day of Judgment.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting the first four verses of Surah Baqarah, Ayatal Kursi and two verses which follow it and the last three verses of this Surah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Zainul Abideen (a.s.) narrates that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said, “One who recites the first four verses of Surah Baqarah, Ayatal Kursi and two verses which follow it and the last three verses of this Surah he and his wealth would remain safe from all calamities. Satan would not come near him and he will never forget the Holy Quran.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مَاجِیلَوَیْهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی الْعَطَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ اللُّؤْلُؤِیِّ عَنْ مُعَاذٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ جُمَیْعٍ رَفَعَهُ إِلَی عَلِیِّ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ قَرَأَ أَرْبَعَ آیَاتٍ مِنْ أَوَّلِ الْبَقَرَهِ وَ آیَهَ الْکُرْسِیِّ وَ آیَتَیْنِ بَعْدَهَا وَ ثَلَاثَ آیَاتٍ مِنْ آخِرِهَا لَمْ یَرَ فِی نَفْسِهِ وَ مَالِهِ شَیْئاً یَکْرَهُهُ وَ لَا یَقْرَبُهُ شَیْطَانٌ وَ لَا یَنْسَی الْقُرْآنَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1.  Imam Zainul Abideen (a.s.) narrates that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites the first four verses of Surah Baqarah, Ayatal Kursi and two verses which follow it and the last three verses of this Surah he and his wealth would remain safe from all calamities. Satan would not come near him and he will never forget the Holy Quran.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Ayatal Kursi after every Salaat and before going to bed
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  It is narrated that Imam Ridha (a.s.) said, “One who recites Ayatal  Kursi  before  going  to  bed  would  remain  safe  of Paralysis  and  one  recites  it  after  every  Salaat  no  poison would harm him.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ الْجَهْمِ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِیمَ بْنِ مِهْزَمٍ عَنْ رَجُلٍ سَمِعَ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ع یَقُولُ مَنْ قَرَأَ آیَهَ الْکُرْسِیِّ عِنْدَ مَنَامِهِ لَمْ یَخَفِ الْفَالِجَ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَهَا بَعْدَ کُلِّ صَلَاهٍ لَمْ یَضُرَّهُ ذُو حُمَهٍ.
